name: case3-keeplatest-dryrun
description: Keep-latest-N policy in dry-run mode. The plan should mark items beyond the top-N for deletion but the mock delete action must NOT be invoked.

_reasoning: wfA: 3 items. Top-2 (newest) = wfA-new + wfA-mid (protected). wfA-old is beyond top-2 -> deleted.
wfB: 1 item -> top-2 of 1 protects it (even though 200 days old).
Dry-run: plan reports 1 deletion, but Invoke-CleanupPlan never calls the delete action.
